macro.title: Rising Rates Stall Housing Market Momentum Just After Closed Home Sales Hit Highest Level Since 2022
macro.what: Closed home sales jumped in May, reflecting April’s dipping mortgage rates and a strong labor market
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: First-time buyers are the missing link in today’s market
macro.what: First-time homebuyers are being structurally locked out of the market by soaring income requirements and moving-target down payments
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Strong Jobs Report Pushes Mortgage Rates Higher, Reopening the Door to Future Fed Hikes
macro.what: Takeaway: Today’s jobs report will lead to higher mortgage rates as it is strong enough to open the door for Fed officials to debate hikes at the next meeting
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: New Listings Fall 1.3%, One of the Biggest Weekly Declines of 2026
macro.what: Would-be home sellers are stepping back as high rates and economic jitters keep buyers on the sidelines
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Sellers Are Pulling Their Homes Off the Market at Near-Record Rates as Buyers Reject High Prices
macro.what: More sellers are delisting in today’s buyer’s market as their homes sit on the market longer than they’d like and/or they’re unable to fetch the price they want
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Modular builder Kinexx eyes ‘hidden-in-plain-sight’ lots for growth
housing.what: Kinexx Modular Construction says it can deliver homes about 20% cheaper and 30% to 50% faster by building off-site, lowering financing and carrying costs
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: ICE Mortgage Monitor: Lock-in effect drives surge in home equity lending
housing.what: ICE says Q1 2026 equity withdrawals hit $47B, second liens pulled $25B and refinance-incentivized buyers fell to 1.8 million in May.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Realtracs extends Zillow listing feed past June 8 deadline
housing.what: Realtracs says Zillow listing distribution will continue past June 8 as licensing talks continue and brokers can use MLS GRID exports.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: OneTrust’s Gabe Bodner on selling reverse mortgages to affluent borrowers
housing.what: Top-producing originators like Gabe Bodner are finding an avenue for growth by selling reverse mortgages not as a lifeline of last resort but as a wealth management tool for afflue

housing.title: Redfin Agents Shine in National RealTrends Verified Rankings
housing.what: More than 1,200 Redfin agents were named among the country’s best real estate professionals by RealTrends Verified, an independently verified ranking of the top real estate agents and teams in the U.S
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: A Look at Listings in Summer Vacation Hotspots, From Myrtle Beach to Cape Cod
housing.what: Dreaming of a second home in a summer hot spot? We took a look at listings of homes in places known for vacation vibes, from a waterfront home in Myrtle Beach to a castle in the Smoky Mountains
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: California reaches $4.6M settlement with Select Portfolio Servicing
notables.what: Under the agreement, which is subject to court approval, SPS will pay $1.6 million in civil penalties and provide $3 million in consumer restitution to affected borrowers.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Lennar elevates two of its longterm operating leaders to C-suite
notables.what: MIAMI — Jim Parker has been promoted to chief operating officer and David Grove to executive vice president of homebuilding at Lennar Corp., the company announced June 5
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: A poor man’s 1031 exchange
notables.what: A “poor man’s 1031 exchange” uses cost segregation and accelerated depreciation on a new purchase to offset taxable gains from a sale in the same year
